decisions.title: Vite project structure
decisions.details: Using Vite + ES modules for better development experience
alternatives: Single HTML - rejected due to scalability issues

decisions.title: Solver approach for N≤3
alternatives: Layer-by-layer beginner - rejected due to being too slow

decisions.title: Solver approach for N>3
decisions.details: Reduction method: solve centers, pair edges, reduce to 3x3x3, then CFOP
alternatives: Direct CFOP on all pieces - rejected due to exponential complexity

decisions.title: LOD rendering strategy
decisions.details: N≤6: individual meshes, N7-15: instanced, N>15: surface-only
alternatives: Always individual meshes - rejected for performance

decisions.title: N range 1-100
decisions.details: Full range supported with adaptive rendering

decisions.title: Dark theme, English UI
decisions.details: Modern dark theme with English interface
